title: University of Toledo Review | Nepali Students | Scholarships | Living cost | Eligibility | Ranking|
body: I came to University of Toledo, 40 years ago from South Korea.  I got my BS in Electrical Engineering and MS in Computer Science and have been working in the US for 32 years as Computer Engineer.  University of Toledo is a great Engineering school,  I had great college experience.  Friends I made during my college years is so important to me.  This is not a place I just went school and get my degree,  more importantly,  I grew as a person.   I wouldn't have done my professional career without my experience and education from University of Toledo.
author: @hkim9551

title: A day in my life as a Neurosurgeon #dayinthelife #dayinmylife #doctor #lifestyle
body: If you enjoyed this content, check out my free newsletter where I share insights and tips on health, fitness, the world of neurosurgery and medicine, and living a good life. My goal is to use my 25 years of experience as a full-time neurosurgeon to educate and inform and help you live a better life. Click the link on my channel if interested 🙂
author: @doctorhoeflinger

title: A day in my life as a Neurosurgeon #dayinthelife #dayinmylife #doctor #lifestyle
body: You're a hero. My mother died in Vanderbilt from brain surgery. She was 40 I was 21. Part of me died with her but God has sustained me and blessed me. She said we will meet again in heaven.
author: @rhondadean5455

title: A day in my life as a Neurosurgeon #dayinthelife #dayinmylife #doctor #lifestyle
body: You seem so shy and humble. Someone who fufils every role in his life perfectly. I have never appreciated healthcare workers as much as i do now. So many who become social media famous and can quit but money was never their goal. Enriching lives and the desire to help is what keeps people like you in the medical field. Hope you get the sucess you deserve on social media and continue to be the brilliant surgeon you are. I love your shorts.
author: @devianadkar7969

title: A day in my life as a Neurosurgeon #dayinthelife #dayinmylife #doctor #lifestyle

title: A day in my life as a Neurosurgeon #dayinthelife #dayinmylife #doctor #lifestyle
body: I had a eight hour surgery. I'm still alive.  Many years later. I give thanks to my team.  I was in ICU after surgery. I heard nurse say you shaved your beard for her?  I gave him words of wisdom and I lived and he listen.  I know I made his Neuro surgery a success because he listened to me! I watch this because it allowed me live a full life .❤️

title: Live on Campus at the University of Toledo
body: I graduated back in 80's  and lived off campus during my UT years.  It was truly memories of my life time.
author: @hkim9551

title: Live on Campus at the University of Toledo
body:
I wish that you guys showed every single residence hall since I haven't seen the newer ones that came out after 2010.

It was fun living on-campus. To those people that's been complaining about the price of living on-campus being too high in the comments area, go grab your calculators and calculate the total amount of housing on-campus and off-campus since I would rather live on-campus than off-campus since it's more stressful to live off-campus.
author: @PaparazziProdigy

title: Live on Campus at the University of Toledo
body: All for the low price of $3000+ a semester... Lower your prices and maybe you wouldn't have to beg students to live on campus.
author: @seandunphy8838

title: Live on Campus at the University of Toledo
body: Just for a change take a look at your ridiculous prices!! Then I can assure you it won't sound so great.
author: @vedantkale1163

title: UToledo Health Science Campus Virtual Tour
body: The compus is small, most of the time one subject is taught by one professor, if you get some issues with the professor, there is no any other choice, you have to take the class with same person, because he/she is the only one teaching that course. Some courses fill quickly during registration time, once classes are full, you need to wait to the next semester and in some cases even to the next year. I have seen corruption. I had one professor who almost doesn't show up to class and only sent assignment on blackboard where in reality the class was supposed to be in person, I didn't see any one who is watching her or asking us how the class was going on. They really have a huge problem and that is why The University's graduation rate is about 46% one of the colleges having  the lowest rate in the state of Ohio.
author: @teweldenegusse1345

title: University of Toledo Campus Tour and downtown|HD|1080
body: I graduated UToledo 1989 with Electrical Engineering.  Back then Engineering was in ES (Engineering Science) building.  When I was about to graduate,  Engineering college started to move old Owens Corning building on Westwood.  I used  to live in a house  in Motebello street , which is off Westwood.  I used to walk and cross over Douglas ave to go to school every day.  This brings me back to old memories.   Thank you sharing this.   University of Toledo is a great school specially for Engineering.
author: @hkim9551

title: University of Toledo -Scott Park Campus tour.
body: I went there in 2008. Lots of memories there. I loved going to the cafeteria it was always the best spot. The cooks were funny
author: @amerdeen9406

title: University of Toledo -Scott Park Campus tour.
body: I was here from 1972-74, and much looks EXACTLY the same.  We didn't have the Cavern or Subway, but I lived in a dorm on Main Campus and took the bus to and from Scott Park.  Bus people....anyone else remember Bett Bus Driver??
author: @loisloar8151

title: University of Toledo -Scott Park Campus tour.
body: The University must be keeping an eye on things, it doesn't look like they even took out the furniture. Even all of the dining area chairs are there and upright! I read that they've decided to use the buildings for something new, I think Owens Community College is going to be taking it over.
author: @Sueb18631
